element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fires automatically; power gauge management introduced immediately
Limited ammo pickup management; power-ups scattered throughout
Score penalty for human casualties; risk/reward for aggressive play
Bonus awarded for complete destruction; affects ending branch
Multi-phase attack pattern; introduces liquid nitrogen mechanic
Required for T-1000 destruction; precision targeting needed
Culmination of all mechanics; time-pressure environment

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing enemy waves in defined areas
typical_tension_triggers: Power gauge depletion during sustained fire
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity across seven stages; 2029 future war (Stages 1-4) establishes mechanics, then 1990s timeline (Stages 5-7) intensifies with higher-stakes objectives and boss encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stages 1-2: Introduce core mechanics (weapon management, power gauge) in battlefield traversal and refugee protection; learning-focused with manageable enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 3-5: Complexity increases via vehicle-based defense (pickup truck), Skynet facility invasion, and environmental destruction objectives; introduces branching endings based on performance
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 6-7: Boss-centric design; T-1000 multi-phase pattern (helicopter, tanker truck, melee combat); culminates in liquid nitrogen freezing and molten steel destruction sequence
notable_spikes: Stage 3: Pickup truck defense introduces moving platform combat
Stage 5: Equipment destruction bonus creates optional high-difficulty challenge path
Stage 6: T-1000 first appearance as mobile boss with dual vehicle attacks
Stage 7: Final boss combines all mechanics under time pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear forward movement through contested space while protecting allies; introduces casualty penalty mechanic that incentivizes selective targeting over spray damage
Mobile platform (pickup truck) with side-scrolling defensive posture; turret-like positioning against incoming Terminators and hunter-killer aircraft
Interior facility environment with explicit destruction goals; optional extended play for bonus; employee/SWAT officer opposition creates moral ambiguity in shooting targets
T-1000 cycle: helicopter attack → tanker truck approach → direct confrontation; liquid nitrogen mechanic blocks/delays progression until mastered; molten steel finale is scripted win condition
